name: config
context: Complete reference for Sentry SDK configuration options — sampling, filtering, integrations, and transport tuning
info: This node is the exhaustive reference for all Sentry JavaScript SDK configuration options passed to Sentry.init(). Covers identity options (dsn, release, environment), error sampling (sampleRate, beforeSend, ignoreErrors, denyUrls, allowUrls), performance tracing (tracesSampleRate, tracesSampler, tracePropagationTargets, beforeSendTransaction), session replay (replaysSessionSampleRate, replaysOnErrorSampleRate), breadcrumbs (maxBreadcrumbs, beforeBreadcrumb), transport (tunnel, transport, transportOptions), debugging (debug, enabled), data normalization (normalizeDepth, normalizeMaxBreadth, maxValueLength), PII handling (sendDefaultPii), and integrations. Agents use this node when tuning SDK behavior for production: reducing event volume, filtering noise, scrubbing PII, configuring custom transports, or adding integrations. See [[sentry/setup]] for basic initialization and [[sentry/capture]] for the event capture API.

sections.title: Identity options (dsn, release, environment)
sections.body: `dsn` (string, required) — Data Source Name URL identifying your Sentry project. `release` (string) — version identifier linking events to source maps and commits, e.g., `my-app@1.2.3`. `environment` (string, default `production`) — deployment target for filtering in the UI. `enabled` (boolean, default `true`) — set to `false` to fully disable the SDK.

sections.title: Error sampling and filtering
sections.body: `sampleRate` (number, 0-1, default 1.0) — probability of capturing each error event. `beforeSend(event, hint) => event|null` — callback to modify or drop events before sending; return `null` to discard. `ignoreErrors` (string[]|RegExp[]) — drop events whose message matches. `allowUrls` (string[]|RegExp[]) — only capture errors from matching script URLs. `denyUrls` (string[]|RegExp[]) — drop errors from matching script URLs (useful for filtering browser extension noise).

sections.title: Performance tracing options
sections.body: `tracesSampleRate` (number, 0-1) — probability of capturing each transaction. `tracesSampler(context) => number|boolean` — dynamic sampling function for per-route control. `tracePropagationTargets` (string[]|RegExp[]) — URLs to receive `sentry-trace` and `baggage` headers for distributed tracing (default: same-origin). `beforeSendTransaction(event) => event|null` — filter transactions before sending. `ignoreTransactions` (string[]|RegExp[]) — drop matching transactions. `beforeSendSpan(span) => span` — modify individual spans.

sections.title: Session replay options
sections.body: `replaysSessionSampleRate` (number, 0-1) — percentage of sessions to continuously record. `replaysOnErrorSampleRate` (number, 0-1) — percentage of error sessions to capture (records the preceding 60 seconds). Requires `Sentry.replayIntegration()` in the integrations array. Privacy options on the integration: `maskAllText`, `blockAllMedia`, `maskAllInputs` to prevent capturing PII in replays.

sections.title: Breadcrumb configuration
sections.body: `maxBreadcrumbs` (number, default 100) — maximum breadcrumbs stored before oldest are dropped. `beforeBreadcrumb(breadcrumb, hint) => breadcrumb|null` — callback to modify or drop breadcrumbs; return `null` to discard. Use to redact sensitive URLs, drop noisy console breadcrumbs, or remove PII from breadcrumb data payloads.

sections.title: Transport and tunnel configuration
sections.body: `tunnel` (string) — URL path on your server that proxies events to Sentry's ingest endpoint, bypassing ad blockers that block `*.ingest.sentry.io`. Your server must forward the raw envelope body to `https://{host}/api/{project_id}/envelope/`. `transport` — custom transport implementation replacing the default fetch-based transport. `transportOptions` — configure custom headers or fetch options on the default transport.

sections.title: Debugging and PII options
sections.body: `debug` (boolean, default false) — log SDK operations to the console for debugging setup issues; disable in production. `attachStacktrace` (boolean, default false) — attach stack traces to `captureMessage` calls, not just exceptions. `sendDefaultPii` (boolean, default false) — automatically collect IP addresses, cookies, and user agent data. `normalizeDepth` (number, default 3) — depth for serializing contextual data objects. `maxValueLength` (number) — truncate string values beyond this length.

sections.title: Integrations reference
sections.body: Browser integrations: `browserTracingIntegration()` for automatic page load and navigation tracing, `replayIntegration()` for session replay, `feedbackIntegration()` for user feedback widget, `httpClientIntegration()` for 4xx/5xx response capture, `captureConsoleIntegration()` for console.error events, `reportingObserverIntegration()` for deprecation/intervention reports. Node integrations: auto-instrumented HTTP, Express, database modules via diagnostic channels. Pass integrations as an array to `Sentry.init({ integrations: [...] })`. Set `defaultIntegrations: false` to disable all defaults.

links.context: Events enriched by configuration flow through beforeSend
Release option determines which source maps apply
Sample rates affect how many events reach alert evaluation

related.note: Basic init must work before tuning advanced options
beforeSend filters events produced by capture methods
release option must match source map uploads

author: dojo-community
